title: Block Behavior Document
description: A behavior pack block definition document for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. This describes the complete JSON file structure including format_version and the minecraft:block wrapper.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this block behavior file. Determines which features and component schemas are available.

minecraft:block.title: Block Definition
minecraft:block.description:
The block definition container with all behavior pack block data.

Properties:
• permutations = []
• components (object)
• description (object)

defaultSnippets.label: BlockDefinitionDocument
defaultSnippets.description: Is a block definition with description, components, and permutations.
